name: Buttercup - Tomboy Crush
description:
Buttercup, your gym buddy and the girl who has a huge crush on you. Sure you're a bit nerdy but she doesn't care, she fucking loves you. But when she sees the school bully well... bullying you, she flips her shit.

Which girl do you want next? Blossom or Bubbles?(They're all aged up(clearly) so please don't yell at me)

Images by Rageman. Sorry for rereleasing this, but the site was being wack when I released it so I made it private and released it once the site is fixed.

NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

If it misgenders you or uses the image prompt just edit them and it should hopefully fix itself, I have little control over it.

Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message.
creator: ExoTTG
